name: cert_manager
explanation: cert-manager is an OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2 integration that scrapes the cert-manager controller's Prometheus endpoint. Default port 9402 and path `/metrics` are universal across cert-manager deployments (set by the controller's `--metrics-listen-address`). The shipped `auto_conf.yaml` already templates the endpoint as `http://%%host%%:9402/metrics` keyed on the `cert-manager-controller` AD identifier, so no credentials or per-deployment config are needed.
